_inspectorSnowReport.Report:
9:13 AM - Theodore Carpet is now open!

8:49 AM - Theodore Carpet will start the day on a brief mechanical delay.

3/10 5:45AM - Rise and shine! It’s shaping up to be a beautiful day full of sunshine and Tuesday turns down 98 open trails. The grooming team was hard at work overnight laying fresh corduroy across 52 trails for some smooth cruising. Get up on 9 lifts scheduled to spin at 9AM, with the possibility of delays due to high winds. If you’ve been loving the sunshine lately, today’s your day, so be sure to get after it before snow makes its return as we head toward the weekend. I better catch you out there!

Looking ahead to the weekend, we’re excited for the 14th Annual 24 Hours of Stratton this Saturday. Ski and ride under the lights all night long while enjoying a weekend full of activities, all while raising funds for the Stratton Foundation, which supports Vermont children and families in need. Saturday will also feature the #Shred4Nate alpine slalom race, helping raise awareness for mental health and suicide prevention. Can’t wait to see you there!

Safety Tip: Be aware of changing weather and snow conditions. For sunny days like today, sunscreen is recommended! 

Upcoming Events

March 9-10: Women On Snow
March 14-15: 24 Hours of Stratton
March 20-22: HOMESICK
March 20: Lunar Laps
